name: Investigation Agent Evaluation
description: Comprehensive test cases for log analysis, blast radius mapping, and impact estimation across incident types.

parts.text: Triage result: P1 incident on payment-service in production. Category: error_rate. Summary: Payment processing completely failed — all transactions returning 500 since deploy v2.14.0 at 14:02 UTC. Error rate at 100%, threshold was 5%. Source: CloudWatch.

Investigation complete. Payment-service is fully down since v2.14.0 deploy. NullPointerException in PaymentProcessor.charge() at ~200/min. Checkout and order services degraded as downstream dependencies. Estimated ~15,000 users affected with ~$2,400/min revenue impact.

Triage result: P2 incident on api-gateway in production. Category: latency. Summary: API response times spiked 6x — latency_p99 at 12400ms (threshold 2000ms). RDS connection pool exhaustion suspected. ~40% of requests timing out. Source: Datadog.

args.error_pattern: ConnectionPoolExhaustedException: unable to acquire connection within 5000ms
args.correlated_event: Traffic spike from marketing campaign at 09:30 UTC

parts.text: Investigation complete. API gateway connection pool exhaustion triggered by traffic spike from marketing campaign. ~40% of requests timing out, affecting ~8,000 users with ~$800/min revenue impact.

Triage result: P3 incident on recommendation-engine in production. Category: resource. Summary: CPU at 87% on 2 of 6 instances (threshold 80%). Recommendation latency slightly elevated but serving normally. Source: CloudWatch.

args.error_pattern: Slow query warnings: recommendation scoring taking >500ms

parts.text: Investigation complete. Two recommendation-engine instances running hot with slow query warnings. No correlated deploy or event — likely organic traffic growth. Minimal user impact, no revenue impact.

Triage result: P1 incident on auth-service in production. Category: security. Summary: Unusual bulk data export detected from admin API — 340 anomalous access patterns (threshold 10). Source IP not in allow-list. Customer PII endpoints accessed. Source: Datadog.

args.error_pattern: Unauthorized admin API access from IP 203.0.113.42 — bulk GET requests to /api/admin/users/export and /api/admin/users/{id}/pii
args.correlated_event: Admin API token last rotated 90 days ago — likely compromised credential

args.estimated_users_affected: ~50,000 users whose PII may have been exposed

parts.text: Investigation complete. Unauthorized bulk data export from admin API using a likely compromised token. ~340 requests to PII endpoints from unauthorized IP over 22 minutes. ~50,000 users' PII potentially exposed. Auth-service and user-data-service affected.

Triage result: P2 incident on cache-service in production. Category: availability. Summary: Redis cluster flapping — availability at 94% (threshold 99%). Nodes alternating between healthy and unhealthy every 2-3 minutes. Cache misses causing elevated latency on dependent services. Source: CloudWatch.

args.error_pattern: RedisConnectionException: Connection reset by peer — cluster node failover in progress
args.correlated_event: Redis cluster maintenance window ended at 16:25 UTC — node rebalancing triggered

args.estimated_users_affected: ~20,000 users experiencing intermittent slowness across multiple features

parts.text: Investigation complete. Redis cluster flapping after maintenance window, causing cascading cache misses across api-gateway, search-service, and user-profile-service. ~20,000 users affected with intermittent slowness. ~$500/min revenue impact from degraded checkout experience.

Triage result: P1 incident on multiple services in production. Category: availability. Summary: AWS us-east-1a availability zone experiencing connectivity issues. Multiple services reporting health check failures. Load balancer draining connections from affected zone. Source: CloudWatch.

args.error_pattern: HealthCheckFailedException: instances in us-east-1a failing TCP health checks — network unreachable
args.last_healthy_version: N/A — infrastructure failure, not code change
args.correlated_event: AWS us-east-1a connectivity degradation reported on AWS status page at 11:40 UTC

args.estimated_users_affected: ~30,000 users — approximately one-third of traffic routed through us-east-1a

parts.text: Investigation complete. AWS us-east-1a AZ failure impacting all services hosted in that zone. Payment, order, user-profile, and api-gateway services degraded with ~33% capacity loss. ~30,000 users affected with ~$3,500/min revenue impact. Infrastructure failure — not caused by code change.

Triage result: P2 incident on user-profile-service in production. Category: resource. Summary: Memory at 96% on 2 of 5 pods (threshold 85%). OOMKilled events causing intermittent 502 errors for ~30% of profile lookups. Memory climbing steadily over 4 hours. Source: Datadog.

args.error_pattern: OOMKilled: container exceeded memory limit 2Gi — heap dump shows growing HashMap in UserCacheManager.loadUserProfiles()
args.frequency: OOMKill events every ~45 minutes per affected pod
args.correlated_event: Deploy v3.5.2 at 02:00 UTC introduced new user profile caching logic

args.estimated_users_affected: ~10,000 users experiencing intermittent profile loading failures

parts.text: Investigation complete. Memory leak in UserCacheManager introduced in v3.5.2 deploy, causing OOMKill events every ~45 minutes. 2 of 5 pods affected, causing ~30% error rate on profile lookups. ~10,000 users impacted with ~$200/min revenue impact.

Triage result: P2 incident on inventory-service in production. Category: data_integrity. Summary: Database replication lag at 45 seconds (threshold 5s). Customers seeing stale inventory counts — items showing available but failing at checkout. Source: CloudWatch.

args.error_pattern: InventoryCheckFailure: item_id=%s shows available=true on read replica but available=false on primary — stale read
args.correlated_event: Large batch import of 50,000 inventory updates started at 15:10 UTC

args.estimated_users_affected: ~5,000 users encountering checkout failures from stale inventory

parts.text: Investigation complete. Replication lag caused by large batch inventory import overloading the replica. Stale reads causing checkout failures for ~5,000 users. Inventory and checkout services degraded. ~$600/min revenue impact.
